title: AI Analysis API Not Using htmlContent Parameter
author: ginlink
body:
## Issue Description  
In `app/api/ai-analysis/route.ts`, although the API receives the `htmlContent` parameter, and the `generateGroqInsights()` function also receives this parameter, it is not used when generating the AI prompt.
  
## Current Behavior  
The prompt only includes:  
- URL  
- Basic analysis scores (`currentChecks`)  
  
But **does not include the actual HTML content**.
  
## Impact  
This causes the AI model to be unable to see the actual content, structure, and context of the webpage, and can only analyze based on the URL and scores.
  
## Question  
Is this an intentional design decision, or an oversight during implementation?
  
## Related Files  
- `app/api/ai-analysis/route.ts`  
- `components/app/(home)/sections/ai-readiness/ControlPanel.tsx` (frontend passes htmlContent when calling)
